title: muhlenbergia tenuiflora var. pauciflora
intro: Muhlenbergia tenuiflora var. pauciflora, also known as slender muhly or little muhly, is a type of grass native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Muhlenbergia tenuiflora var. pauciflora include its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, which can help to boost the immune system and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, fever, and digestive issues.
